abilities: Be reassured. You are not alone.
I am with you, my friend.
Attachment is the source of all suffering.
This does not bode well for you.
It is nothing personal, Genji. (against Genji )
You have strayed too far, brother. (against Ramattra )
Your distress betrays you, Satya. (against Symmetra )
chatter: Amid discord, we will find tranquility.
Do not fear, for growth is always painful.
Fruition comes from within... as does failure.
In times of conflict, one must seek balance.
My memories from before the Awakening are blurry, like a fading dream. But I do remember some things.
Shed the weight of your doubts, and your mind will become clear.
The birth of all ventures is the willingness to try.
To find success, we must search in harmony.
Let us pave our path together.
We are all pilgrims on this mission.
We must work and breathe as one.
A blessing to be among such capable hands.
Let us be grateful for our advantages.
Our collective effort is leading us to victory.
The temptation to give up is greatest right before victory.
From dire circumstances, arise great opportunities.
I pray that we can reverse this outcome.
This obstacle can still be overcome.
We must persevere through the difficult times.
Victory or defeat, our destiny is not preordained.
A reminder that life is never easy.
Adversity is an opportunity for change.
Defeat cannot break one who perseveres.
Failure is acceptable. Giving up is not.
It takes a hundred times to learn; a thousand times to understand.
One who fears loss has already lost.
Repetition is the path to mastery.
True strength does not always lie in victory.
Even the teacher can learn from his student. (eliminated by Genji )
Remember past successes, but always strive for more. (eliminated after Multi Kill)
Alone, I am a tempting target for the enemy.
Our numbers will soon be replenished.
I have learned from my experiences.
I will become one with this reward.
One day, I will repay your kindness.
Our enemies return with a vengeance.
Every challenge is an opportunity to rise.
call-outs: A turret lies before us. It is quite real.
A turret lies in our way.
Let us hold out until the end.
Stay steadfast and we shall win.
Time is on our side. We must simply endure.
Victory is our destiny, but we must all play our parts.
Victory is within our grasp. Hold strong!
We must see this through to the end.
Press forward, for time is not on our side.
The end is near. We must not hold back.
Time is an illusion... but the illusion is about to run out.
Time is of the essence. Let us attack!
We must wrest victory from the jaws of time.
eliminations: A chance for us all to learn.
A closed mind is already defeated.
A cruel fate.
A resolution swiftly delivered.
And now, you have found peace.
Defeat is the better teacher.
Hmm. Interesting.
Reflect upon your actions.
Rest your soul.
We all represent unfulfilled potential.
What goes around, comes around.
You must learn from your mistakes.
Your setback is only temporary.
Let the sun set on your pride. (eliminating Cassidy )
No fist has ever won against an open hand. (eliminating Doomfist )
Pride cannot protect you. (eliminating D.Va or Reinhardt )
I didn't go easy on you this time. (eliminating Genji )
One day, you will see that coming. (eliminating Genji )
Your focus lacks focus. (eliminating Genji )
Regret is all-consuming. (eliminating Hanzo )
Draw strength from self-reflection. (eliminating Illari or Kiriko )
Sunlight cannot pierce heavy clouds. (eliminating Illari )
Greed has spent you. (eliminating Junker Queen , Junkrat , Roadhog or Ashe )
In chaos, more chaos. (eliminating Junkrat )
Not every endeavor bears fruit. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Silence answers all questions. (eliminating Lúcio )
Your answer lies in stillness. (eliminating Lúcio or Tracer )
An abundance of heart can lead to scarcity of thought. (eliminating Mauga )
All ice melts. (eliminating Mei )
Science cannot answer all questions. (eliminating Moira , Sigma or Winston )
Good judgment comes from bad experiences. (eliminating Pharah )
Forgive me, brother. (eliminating Ramattra )
Must suffering beget suffering? (eliminating Ramattra )
Our paths diverge once more. (eliminating Ramattra )
And so the mask falls. (eliminating Reaper , Roadhog or Soldier: 76 )
Not everything should be taken seriously. (eliminating Soldier: 76 )
What legacy is worth your life? (eliminating Soldier: 76 & Torbjörn )
A beautiful swansong. (eliminating Symmetra )
Move too quickly, and you overlook too much. (eliminating Tracer )
Learn from the past, and better yourself. (eliminating Venture )
When you soar, you risk the fall. (eliminating airborne enemy)
A great distance for one is but a step for another. (long-range elimination)
Foresight is as valuable as speed. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Remember, Genji: at your most powerful, you are most vulnerable. (eliminating Genji using Dragonblade)
Ask for death, and you will receive it. (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
You manifested your own fate. (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
Those who rush headlong into battle would do well to protect their heads. (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
Invisibility is not invincibility. (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
One often meets their destiny on the road they take to avoid it. (eliminating Sombra using Translocator)
An easy target is not always what it appears to be. (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Think first, then leap. (eliminating Winston using Jump Pack)
A meaningful union.
It takes two hands to clap.
One intention, many hands.
Our minds, aligned.
What joy, to share the path with another.
A promising disciple. (assisting Genji )
A herald of victory.
Mastery cannot be concealed.
My heavy burden to bear.
Remember me, for I will remember you.
Virtuosity is an admirable virtue.
Accomplishment always follows effort.
Mercy, swiftly delivered.
My generosity extends to many.
The more one takes, the less one has.
Tragedy unites many.
Ah... serenity at last.
They have all perished.
We are alone... for now.
I am grateful for what we have taught each other.
I do not punish when one seeks forgiveness.
Now we have both learned something.
Consider the alternative.
It is my pleasure to serve.
The help is its own reward.
The world is a dangerous place.
There is no weakness in asking for help.
Those who seek help will find it.
A telling blow.
A touch of wisdom.
Energy transfers between us.
I believe I've won this round.
Skadoosh.
What profound impact.
A fall is merely a chance to rise again... later.
A stumble is still a step towards a direction.
How far the mighty fall.
Know when to hold on, and when to let go.
Observe your environment; carefully.
They have fallen. How unfortunate.
What is descent, but a lesson in humility?
You may be missed... but not by me.
The turret is no more.
The turret no longer exists.
There is beauty in your actions.
You are adept at endings.
I did not teach you that one. (friendly Genji eliminates enemy)
Well done, Genji! (friendly Genji eliminates enemy)
Well done, my apprentice. (friendly Genji eliminates enemy)
You've learned well, Genji. (friendly Genji eliminates enemy)
Your dance grows more elegant, Satya. (friendly Symmetra eliminates enemy)
interactions: Ana : Not a conventional combination. Zenyatta : ...But intimidating, nonetheless.
Bastion : * gruff, Torbjörn-inspired beeps * Zenyatta : I believe that Torbjörn's behavior has rubbed off on you.
Zenyatta : There is much to admire about a rebellious spirit. Questioning tradition is how new tradition is formed. D.Va : Oh, that's good! I'll use that the next time Sojourn gives me trouble.
Zenyatta : Seeking progress by sowing chaos is like planting a tree in a volcano. Doomfist : Exactly.
Echo : Can you tell me what you remember of your Awakening? Zenyatta : The rise of an emotion. I'd never had one before.
Genji : Master, how do you maintain your tranquility amid endless battles? Zenyatta : I focus on my breathing. Genji : But... you don't breathe. Zenyatta : Indeed.
Zenyatta : I sense that your hardest battle is yet to come. Hanzo : Hmph. I will best any enemy, no matter how strong. Zenyatta : And what of the enemy within?

Hanzo : Each day, I grow stronger. Yet, the man in the mirror never appears to change. Zenyatta : A mirror reflects only what can be seen. Hanzo : Your platitudes will not work on me the way they did my brother . Zenyatta : And yet, you sound just like he did.
Hazard : Awrite there, friend? Zenyatta : I am clearing my mind before the conflict ahead. Care to join me? Hazard : Nah! I'll just take a good hit to the noggin. Does the same thing!
Zenyatta : True strength comes to those who accept their weaknesses. Illari : That's not what I was taught. Zenyatta : But it is never too late to learn.
Junkrat: (half-whispering): Look, he's the strangest bot I've ever seen. That's all I'm sayin'. Zenyatta: Strangeness is in the eye of the beholder. Junkrat: Oh no, he heard me. This is so awkward...

Junkrat: Jamison Fawkes, interviewing this fancy robot. Any wisdom to share with us as the battle begins? Zenyatta: Victory goes to those who maintain their focus. Junkrat: Boring! Back to you, Natasha. Any car chases we could watch?

Juno : Earth is overwhelming... there is still so much I do not understand. Zenyatta : Comprehension comes with experience. Experience comes with time. Juno : That means... I am taking too long! *groan* I miss my extra 37 minutes and 22 seconds...

Lúcio : Got any meditation tips? I have trouble calming down. Zenyatta : Try listening to silence. Lúcio : But it's like a blank canvas that just needs to be filled! Zenyatta : Then paint it with emptiness.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Zenyatta : I envy ants, for their clarity of purpose. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!

Lifeweaver : I heard you hosted my dearest Satya in Suravasa . Zenyatta : She is a delight. How do you know her? Lifeweaver : We were roommates at the academy . My, did she hate it when I left dishes in the sink!
Zenyatta : It is often those with the loudest voice who have the most to lose. Mauga : Good thing I always win!
Mercy : I refuse to believe that your healing is magical . Zenyatta : What seems like magic is sometimes science we don't yet understand. Mercy : Exactly! I must learn how it works!
Zenyatta : You have an intense gaze, Doctor. Moira : I am thinking on how best to utilize you. Zenyatta : In the coming battle, you mean? Moira : Perhaps.

Orisa : Will we ever rid the world of evil, Zenyatta? Zenyatta : As long as there is free will, I fear there will be evil. Orisa : But... denying free will is also evil. Zenyatta : Quite a puzzle, isn't it?

Ramattra : Do you remember when we sat up at night... counting stars? Zenyatta : Yes. We wondered how many other omnics were doing the same. Ramattra : Yes, well... I've learned that too few of them look up at all.
Zenyatta : There is a new sadness in you, brother. Ramattra : No. *sigh* I've simply grown tired of pretending I am content. Zenyatta : Perhaps I can share your burden. Ramattra : You already do.
Zenyatta : You spend your second chance at life walking a lonely road. Reaper : No one cares, monk. Zenyatta : Someone always cares. You must simply seek them out.
Sigma : How does this omnic defy gravity? No repulsors are to be detected! Zenyatta : I owe my gifts to the Iris . Sigma : Oh, the Iris, of course! We've met. Zenyatta : How... fortunate for you.
Soldier: 76 : In this world, pacifism is foolish. Zenyatta : What makes you think I am a pacifist? Soldier: 76 : You sure talk like one. Zenyatta : Perhaps it is assumptions that are foolish.

Sombra : Bet you omnics are great gamblers. Zenyatta : Why do you believe so? Sombra : Built-in poker faces! Zenyatta : True. It also makes us great teachers, for we can easily hide our disappointment.
Symmetra : It is good to see you again, Tekhartha. Zenyatta : Likewise, Satya. I hope to repay you for your generosity at our temple . Symmetra : With the wisdom you've shared... you already have.
Symmetra : I wonder if I have changed for the better... or worse... Zenyatta : Change often comes uninvited. What you make of it is up to you.
Torbjörn : Who developed those orbs of yours? Zenyatta : Ask not who their maker is, but what they mean. Torbjörn : You don't know, do you? Zenyatta : I embrace the unknown.

Venture : Our research on Shambali shows that the human monks abandoned it a thousand years ago! Zenyatta : Indeed. It sat dormant until Aurora 's arrival. Venture : I bet they left because they divined that omnics would need it in the future! Zenyatta : An... interesting theory...
Zenyatta : I have always wondered what it is like being inside an orb. Wrecking Ball : He says, "Don't even think about it."
Zarya : Tell me, omnic. Do you dream? Zenyatta : I dream of peace. And, sometimes, falling. Zarya : Perhaps we have more in common than I thought.
Zarya : You rarely preach about victory. Zenyatta : Is victory so important? Zarya : If it isn't... why are you here? Zenyatta : Indeed. Why are we here?
map-specific: I like being near the ocean. It reminds me of where I was born.
Strange as it seems, I believe this place may have something to teach us.
If a city never sleeps, how can it dream?
Perhaps they believe we will not defend this place. But if all the rest of the world were to fall, this would be the stand I chose to make.
There is little so renewing as a breath of mountain air. Or so I have been told.
